mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM eval_type_52 ORDER BY year DESC

SELECT m.eval_type_id AS typeId, FORMAT(et.start_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ~ ' + FORMAT(et.end_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS evalPeriod, d.name AS deptName, e.position AS position, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, CASE WHEN m.status = 0 THEN '본인평가중' WHEN m.status = 1 THEN '1차평가대기' WHEN m.status = 2 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '알수없음' END AS status FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m JOIN employee_52 e ON m.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id JOIN eval_type_52 et ON m.eval_type_id = et.id WHERE m.eval_type_id = 2 AND m.step = 0 AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (e.emp_no = #{empNo} OR d.leader_emp_no = #{empNo})
AND et.year = #{year}
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN e.emp_no = #{empNo} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END), e.emp_no ASC

SELECT TOP 1 m.eval_type_id AS typeId, d.name AS deptName, d.leader_emp_no AS leaderEmpNo, e.position AS position, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, fr.grade AS totalGrade, CASE WHEN m.status = 0 THEN '본인평가중' WHEN m.status = 1 THEN '1차평가대기' WHEN m.status = 2 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '알수없음' END AS status FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m JOIN employee_52 e ON m.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN final_result_52 fr ON e.emp_no = fr.emp_no AND fr.year = (SELECT TOP 1 year FROM eval_type_52 WHERE id = m.eval_type_id) WHERE m.eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND m.evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND m.step = 0

SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.category AS categoryName, q.question AS goalDesc, q.weight AS weight, a1.content AS selfFeedback, a1.score AS selfScore, a2.content AS firstFeedback, a2.score AS firstScore FROM eval_question_52 q LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a1 ON q.id = a1.question_id AND a1.mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC ) LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a2 ON q.id = a2.question_id AND a2.mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC ) WHERE q.type_id = #{typeId}
mapper.update: IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eval_answer_52 WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC ) ) BEGIN UPDATE eval_answer_52 SET content = #{item.selfFeedback}, score = #{item.selfScore} WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC ) END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO eval_answer_52 (question_id, mapping_id, score, content, created_at) VALUES ( #{item.questionId}, (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC), #{item.selfScore}, #{item.selfFeedback}, GETDATE() ) END

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eval_answer_52 WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC ) ) BEGIN UPDATE eval_answer_52 SET content = #{item.firstFeedback}, score = #{item.firstScore} WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC ) END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO eval_answer_52 (question_id, mapping_id, score, content, created_at) VALUES ( #{item.questionId}, (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC), #{item.firstScore}, #{item.firstFeedback}, GETDATE() ) END
